body:
**Are these deals real?**

Yes. Every product listed on StoreForLess is checked before publishing, and the price shown is what we last confirmed at the retailer. We do not use fake countdown timers or inflated "was" prices.

**How does shipping work?**

Shipping is handled directly by the retailer (such as Amazon) once you click through and complete your purchase. Delivery times and costs depend on your location and the retailer's own shipping policy.

**Do you sell anything directly?**

No. StoreForLess does not manufacture, stock, or ship any products ourselves. We link out to trusted retailers, and may earn a small commission on qualifying purchases at no extra cost to you.

**What if a link is broken or the price changed?**

Prices can change at any time at the retailer's end. If you spot a broken link or a price that no longer matches, please contact us and we will review it as quickly as possible.

**How can I contact customer support?**

You can reach us anytime using the WhatsApp button in the corner of the screen, or through our Contact page.
